scenario.name: register_auth_uac
scenario.send: REGISTER sip:sip.merchant.yunshu.com SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] From: <sip:[service]@sip.merchant.yunshu.com>;tag=[call_number] To: <sip:[service]@sip.merchant.yunshu.com> Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: 1 REGISTER Contact: <sip:[service]@[local_ip]:[local_port]> Max-Forwards: 70 Expires: 3600 Content-Length: 0

REGISTER sip:sip.merchant.yunshu.com SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] From: <sip:[service]@sip.merchant.yunshu.com>;tag=[call_number] To: <sip:[service]@sip.merchant.yunshu.com> Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: 2 REGISTER Contact: <sip:[service]@[local_ip]:[local_port]> Max-Forwards: 70 Expires: 3600 [authentication username=1001 password=e2e-test-1001] Content-Length: 0
